subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath treasured for the promotion of His Covenant! From the realm of longing no utterance can be made; therefore it is best to entrust it to the heart and conscience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لترویج میثاقه از عالم اشتیاق بیان نتوان لهذا حواله بضمیر و وجدان خوشتر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
